name: Key Vault diagnostic logging not enabled
description: Diagnostic logging is not enabled on the Key Vault. Without audit logs, access to secrets, keys, and certificates cannot be monitored — making it impossible to detect unauthorized access or key exfiltration.
remediation: Enable diagnostic settings on all Key Vaults to send AuditEvent logs to Log Analytics or a Storage Account. Set retention to at least 90 days. Create alerts for high-volume access or access from unexpected IPs.
